subcodes.first_line: O Ancient Beauty and Gracious Lord! The friends are aflame with fervor, and Thy loved ones are devoted at the threshold. All turn their faces toward Thy path with yearning [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای جمال قدیم و ربّ کریم یاران پرفورانند و دوستان عاکف آستان کلّ توجّه بکوی تو دارند و آرزوی
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @two kinds of knowledge [ilm and irfan]; sight and insight, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity
